intro: Isnardia sphaerocarpa, also known as Sphaerocarpos, is a type of liverwort, a small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the phylum Marchantiophyta. Traditionally, Isnardia sphaerocarpa is used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Isnardia sphaerocarpa is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems.
